name: Stuffed Mushrooms with Crabmeat
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup sour cream or plain yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw and squeeze out excess liquid from the crab meat.
2. Finely chop the mushroom stems.
3. In a medium bowl, combine chopped mushroom stems, vegetable soup mix, thawed crab meat, sour cream or yogurt, bread crumbs, dill, hot pepper sauce, and pepper.
4. Place mushroom caps on a lightly greased baking sheet. Stuff each cap with the crab meat mixture, then brush with butter.
5. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes or until tender.
6. Makes about 12 appetizers.
Make-Ahead Directions:
Mushrooms can be partially prepared up to 1 day ahead. Prepare and stuff as above, then cover and refrigerate. To serve, brush with butter and bake at 350°F for 15 minutes or until tender.
